scripts.bootstrap:python: cd backend && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.bootstrap:ai-service: cd services/ai-service && (test -d .venv || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.seed:full-sql: docker exec -i linkedin-mysql mysql -ulinkedin_user -plinkedin_pass linkedin_db < scripts/seed-full-db.sql
scripts.seed:demo-jobs: docker exec -i linkedin-mysql mysql -ulinkedin_user -plinkedin_pass linkedin_db < scripts/seed-demo-jobs.sql
scripts.test:backend:integration: cd backend && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements-dev.txt && INTEGRATION_TEST=1 .venv/bin/pytest tests/test_integration_live.py -v
scripts.start:all: npx concurrently "npm run dev:api-python" "npm run dev:workers-python" "npm run dev:ai-service"
